name: Solo Leveling
synopsis: The world's weakest E-rank hunter alone gains the power to level up without limit, growing into humanity's strongest as monster gates threaten the world.
foot: Proven global action IP — multiple options already in play.

name: Nano Machine
synopsis: A slighted disciple of a murim sect is implanted with a nanomachine from a future descendant, gaining superhuman power to rise through a martial-arts world.
foot: Surging murim-SF hit; clean anime route, no deal yet.

name: Return of the Mount Hua Sect
synopsis: A legendary swordsman of the Mount Hua Sect dies defeating a demon lord and is reborn a century later as a boy — only to find his once-great sect in ruins, and sets out to restore it.
foot: Huge source but momentum past peak — ratings and readers declining.

name: Lookism
synopsis: A bullied, unattractive teen wakes up able to switch between his original body and a second, tall and handsome one, navigating a world obsessed with appearance.
foot: Global Naver hit; dual-body premise needs animation.

name: The Youngest Son of a Swordsmanship Family
synopsis: A dying mercenary is reborn as the talentless youngest son of a fallen prestigious swordsmanship family and uses his past-life skill to restore its glory.
foot: KakaoPage mega-hit; strong single-format anime route.

name: The Remarried Empress
synopsis: After her emperor husband brings home a mistress, an empress calmly negotiates a divorce and remarries into a neighboring empire, turning court politics to her favor.
foot: Palace fantasy carrying drama, film and anime — rare 3-format breadth.

name: Overgeared
synopsis: A struggling gamer obtains a legendary blacksmith class in a full-dive VR world and rises to power through crafting and combat.
foot: Long-running VR-gaming fantasy with a deep world — natural anime candidate.

name: Eleceed
synopsis: A kind boy with lightning-fast reflexes bonds with a cat that is secretly a powerful awakened being, and trains among hidden superhumans.
foot: Fast superpower action; top anime fit.

name: Reformation of the Deadbeat Noble
synopsis: A martial artist consumed by a demonic art dies and returns to his youth, seeking to redo his violent life and master the martial world.
foot: Franchise-grade martial-arts source with no screen deal yet.

name: The Greatest Estate Designer
synopsis: A modern landscape designer is transported into a game world as a noble and uses real construction and design knowledge to transform a barren territory.
foot: Rising strategy-fantasy with strong buzz.

name: Trash of the Count's Family
synopsis: A man wakes inside a novel he read as the family disappointment and, knowing the plot, quietly grows strong to survive the coming catastrophes.
foot: Redice action-fantasy hit — clean single-format anime candidate.

name: SSS-Class Suicide Hunter
synopsis: A low-rank hunter gains an S+ skill that only triggers when he dies, forcing him to master death itself to grow stronger.
foot: Dark hunter premise, broad fit — low-cost multi-format experiment.

name: Mercenary Enrollment
synopsis: A boy who survived a plane crash and grew up as a hardened mercenary returns to ordinary school life, protecting his estranged family.
foot: Naver action hit with drama crossover.

name: The Villainess Is a Marionette
synopsis: Reborn as a discarded princess written as a villainess, a woman breaks free of the story's strings to claim power and rewrite her fate at court.
foot: Romance-fantasy villainess — the rare drama-led discovery.

name: The Debut or Die
synopsis: A man is transported into an idol-survival world where he must debut as an idol or die, using modern knowledge to climb the brutal K-pop pipeline.
foot: Idol-survival web-novel — non-anime call; drama / K-pop route.

name: Pick Me Up
synopsis: A player is pulled into a brutal gacha dungeon game and must clear its impossible stages without a single failure, commanding summoned heroes.
foot: KakaoPage #1 fantasy 2025 — fast-action gacha premise, anime route.

name: Red Storm
synopsis: A young warrior of a desert tribe is trained by a mysterious master and rises through a harsh world of clans and war.
foot: Long-running action staple; anime candidate.

name: Salaryman Ghost Story
synopsis: An ordinary office worker is trapped in a world of urban-legend horrors and must survive supernatural threats while still clocking in to work.
foot: 2025 KakaoPage breakout — modern-fantasy horror-comedy; drama/anime.

name: This Life I Will Be the Family Head
synopsis: Reborn into a noble house destined for ruin, a woman seizes control of the family to change its fate.
foot: Popular rofan; drama or anime.

name: Under the Oak Tree
synopsis: A stammering duchess is abruptly married to a knight who leaves for war, and their relationship slowly transforms on his return.
foot: Rofan mega-hit; strong drama potential.

name: Solo Max-Level Newbie
synopsis: A game-guide streamer wakes to find the game he mastered has become reality, entering as a max-knowledge newbie.
foot: Game-fantasy hit; anime route.

name: Beware the Villainess
synopsis: A modern woman possesses a doomed villainess and upends the romance-fantasy plot with blunt common sense and comedy.
foot: Beloved comedic rofan; drama/anime.

name: The Tutorial Is Too Hard
synopsis: A man enters a brutal tower tutorial that never ends, forced to grow impossibly strong just to survive the first stage.
foot: Hardcore tower-climbing action; anime route.

name: Death Is the Only Ending for the Villainess
synopsis: Reincarnated as a villainess whose every route ends in death, a woman schemes to survive the story she is trapped in.
foot: Huge rofan IP; drama/anime.

name: Manager Kim
synopsis: A retired elite bodyguard, now an ordinary middle manager, is pulled back into a violent world to protect those around him.
foot: Action-revenge hit with adult drama appeal.

name: Tomb Raider King
synopsis: A man who can hear the voices of relics uses ancient artifacts to hunt tombs worldwide and outgrow rival treasure-hunting families.
foot: Action-adventure Naver hit; anime or film route.

name: Legendary Moonlight Sculptor
synopsis: A young man burdened with debt masters a legendary sculptor class in a full-dive VR world, turning play into a fortune and a legend.
foot: Landmark game-fantasy source; anime route.

name: Mookhyang: Dark Lady
synopsis: A martial-arts master is reborn into a Western fantasy world as a woman, blending Eastern martial skill with magic and dragons.
foot: Long-running martial-fantasy with a female lead; anime.

name: The Bystander
synopsis: Reborn as a background extra in a romance-fantasy novel, a woman just wants to watch the leads from the sidelines — but keeps getting pulled center stage.
foot: Comedic rofan with strong word-of-mouth; drama/anime.

name: A Practical Guide to Love
synopsis: Two guarded college students, both wary of dating, slowly learn how to love through everyday campus missteps and small honesties.
foot: College romance / slice-of-life; a clean drama-route pick.

name: Money Game
synopsis: Eight strangers are locked in a sealed space with a huge prize that shrinks with every expense, and greed slowly turns them against each other.
foot: Viral survival thriller; strong drama/film route.

name: Garbage Time
synopsis: A no-name high-school basketball team with an obsessive underdog spirit claws its way through a brutal tournament bracket.
foot: Beloved sports drama with a fervent fandom; drama route.

name: Odd Girl Out
synopsis: Four high-school girls navigate friendship, first love and quiet heartbreak across the small dramas of everyday school life.
foot: Slice-of-life romance; long-running, drama route.

name: Jungle Juice
synopsis: A college student who takes a shady insecticide sprouts wings and is thrown into a hidden underworld of half-insect humans fighting to survive.
foot: Creature-action premise suited to animation.
